script: set +e; cd /etc/claude-tokens; HEALTHY=""; for f in *.env; do sz=$(stat -c%s "$f"); if [ "$sz" -ge 150 ] && [ -z "$HEALTHY" ]; then HEALTHY="$f"; fi; done; echo "healthy donor: $HEALTHY"; FIXED=""; for f in *.env; do sz=$(stat -c%s "$f"); if [ "$sz" -lt 100 ]; then sudo cp -p "$HEALTHY" "$f"; FIXED="$FIXED $f"; fi; done; echo "fixed:$FIXED"; for f in $FIXED; do prefix="${f%.env}"; sudo systemctl restart "${prefix}-responder.service" 2>&1; echo "  ${prefix}-responder: $(systemctl is-active ${prefix}-responder.service)"; done; echo done
